horoscope: Tonight’s Full Moon occurs in the sign opposite yours, dear Aries, reminding you of your relationship needs and goals. Relationship issues, a personal matter, your true feelings about someone, or a partner’s needs might come to light now. You might recognize your need for someone or for some quality feedback. Through epiphanies occurring around now, you’re awakening to your relationship goals or your true feelings on a matter, and both can help guide you toward making changes. Revelations occurring now are significant, but taking action on them should wait until emotions have settled a little.

A Full Moon occurs in your work and wellness sector today, dear Taurus, and you might reach a turning point with a work project or situation, or with a health matter. In the days ahead, the need to make changes in your routines or job becomes apparent. Frustrations with working conditions can push you to seek change. A work project might begin or end. Keep in mind that your feelings may be large right now, but will even out in the coming days, so do listen to what your intuition is telling you, but hold off on the big moves. Blockages that come to light can be revealing. Good energy is with you for some friendly competition that stimulates you to do your best or to reach higher. Don't be afraid to be creative. You might see a flaw in a plan that sets you on the road to improvement, or events now remind you to manage your time well.

Tonight's Full Moon pulls out your need to connect and share, dear Gemini. It opens your heart to buried feelings and your eyes to situations that need your attention. A social matter or project can reach a turning point now, or an epiphany or breakthrough can motivate you to make changes. A love relationship or a project close to your heart can be in stronger focus. This lunation brings love, creativity, fun, entertainment, and self-expression into the spotlight, and your need for these things becomes undeniable now. You might have an epiphany that leads you to conclude you should enjoy and express yourself more fully. Buried or unacknowledged emotions rise to the surface, and it feels great to release them. New information or a burst of emotion can prompt a turning point.

Tonight’s Full Moon takes place in your home and family sector, dear Cancer, stirring the need to handle a family or personal matter. If you’ve been too heavily invested in your work or responsibilities to the outside world, the imbalance stands out now. It's a time to recognize the need for improved time and energy management and a better work-life balance. It can be a call to attend to domestic matters as you connect with and acknowledge your needs for nurture, safety, and comfort. You are particularly sensitive now, and there can be some tendency to dramatize things, but this may be necessary to stir you to make necessary changes. Things that you've been avoiding or overlooking may reveal themselves.

Tonight's Full Moon can bring deadlines, errands, and paperwork to your attention, dear Leo. If you've slacked a little in your daily affairs, the signals are now around you to restore some balance to your life. Communications, connecting, and transportation are in the spotlight, and changes are afoot. It's a time of heightened awareness of your need for a smooth flow in your daily affairs, so you can feel freer to take advantage of opportunities to learn more, grow, expand your audience, and broaden your experiences. Self-honesty can have a lovely, cleansing, and purging effect on you. A revelation about your feelings on a matter can spur you on. A writing or learning project can come to completion, or publicity or promotion can be in focus. Tension over unmet or unspoken needs can certainly surface, and it's time to pay attention to them. You can also feel a strong desire to be understood.

Tonight’s Full Moon brings money matters, talents, and values into sharp focus for you, dear Virgo. This lunation can spark a revelation or mark a turning point in matters of money, ownership, valuables, the sharing of responsibilities, and power dynamics. You see an issue more clearly and are honest with yourself, which can be cleansing. You're heading towards greater feelings of self-worth, value, security, and comfort, and epiphanies now can get you closer to your goals. Do your best to get on top of your finances and aim to show your abilities as best as possible. Emotions run high around any Full Moon, so take your time before making any important decisions, but pay attention to what comes to light. There can be a settlement of money or attention to something that you owe. Be moderate in your expectations and what you take on, as you don’t need to commit to more than you can handle.

The Moon is in your sign all day and reaches full later today, dear Libra, heightening emotions. This can be a time of personal epiphanies. If you've been paying a lot of attention to others' needs recently, as is likely given your highlighted partnership sector, then this is a time to put your needs up front and center. Finding a better balance in your relationships can be a focus. Something can come to you quite suddenly -- an epiphany or revelation -- that might even surprise you. Close personal relationships are likely to figure strongly in your discoveries now and in the coming week. Avoid stretching yourself too thin, and don't make final conclusions until you've reached a state of inner certainty, as there is a real tendency for matters to be dramatically magnified before settling down.

A Full Moon occurs tonight, and it illuminates a work, health, or personal matter for you, dear Scorpio. What comes to light now helps you see where to go next. Temporarily, though, you could feel a little lost as boundaries between your feelings and the outside world are blurred, and you could be overwhelmed by others’ emotions or elements of the past that haven’t been put to rest. However, from these experiences, new insight emerges. This Full Moon can prompt a sudden discovery of the need for extra time alone or rest, healing, and regeneration, particularly if you’ve been pushing yourself too hard recently. This need for rest becomes paramount, even though it feels at odds with your drive toward work or health matters. Circumstances force the need to arrive at a healthy balance between time for yourself and time for your chores.

Tonight's Full Moon can bring people to you, dear Sagittarius, or it can stir up a lot of activity in your social life. It can illuminate a friendship or romantic matter, or your feelings can become hard to ignore now. It can be a time of invites or a sudden demand for your help, support, or company – the theme is recognizing your need for others. This Full Moon also brings to light hidden feelings or resources, and you can feel purged and empowered as a result. People tend to exaggerate or create drama now, so take your time and observe before moving to action. There is a larger-than-life element to your own feelings and desires. Dormant or undiscovered talents can awaken! Feelings for someone or a project can blossom.

Today's Full Moon occurs at the top of your solar chart, dear Capricorn, reminding you to pay special attention to your work or reputation. A responsibility or a call to action is possible now. You might recognize the need to perform or take the lead. A reward, an award, or the culmination of a project can pull you out of your shell. This Full Moon may very well challenge your desire to stay out of the limelight or to avoid specific responsibilities. There has been a helpful focus on your home and family life these days, but going too far with it means the benefits begin to drop off. You are in an exposed position today, so try to play it cool! You're discovering your true feelings about the direction your life is taking. Let your revelations today motivate you to strike a better work-home balance.

Tonight’s Full Moon encourages you to pay attention to your need for a stronger connection to the outside world, dear Aquarius. It can stir an important realization about how the attitudes you bring to the world affect your life path. There might be a sudden desire (or need) to depart from your usual routine or do something more refreshing, meaningful, and life-affirming. This Full Moon can also bring an idea or project to full bloom. Aim for moderation by setting limits and priorities, as your worst enemy right now could be a tendency towards excess. Your need for more spirited activities and interests is in the spotlight.

Tonight’s Full Moon turns you inward, dear Pisces. It can pull out strong feelings and lead to a revelation or epiphany about the need for someone or support, whether this is emotional, moral, or financial. The balance of power in a relationship, debts, a partner’s income, or other shared resources can be in sharp focus and stir strong feelings. Release from a burden can be a theme. With this Full Moon, emotional rumblings are strong. You might open your eyes to a financial matter you’ve been overlooking, or there can be blossoming feelings in your love life. Revelations at this time are catalysts for making changes related to dependencies and support systems.
